steps.t: Ponto Oats is standing on the road that leads down to Dwaling. Ponto is waiting to speak with you about your upcoming retrieval.
The club for which you are seeking is on the ground by the sleeping brigands near Pearlina Gamgee's house in Dwaling. Ponto is waiting for you to retr…
Ponto Oats is on the slope at the northern edge of Dwaling. Ponto is waiting to hear about your retrieval of the club.
